title: Untradable Villagers
description:
Removes trade with villagers if enable.
To get them back, wait a little or update the profession table.
body:
If enabled, then the villagers will no longer have trades, but the profession will remain. If you want to return the auction, simply turn off the datapack and update the profession table.
